item.title: Giant Sandwich Eating Challenge
item.description: A massive sandwich is featured in a competitive eating challenge, testing speed and appetite with oversized portions and layered ingredients.

media:content.media:title: Giant Sandwich Eating Challenge
media:content.media:description: A massive sandwich is featured in a competitive eating challenge, testing speed and appetite with oversized portions and layered ingredients.

item.title: Can I Finish a Huge Burger for $100?
item.description: A massive burger challenge with a cash prize on the line, testing appetite, endurance, and speed in a competitive eating setup.

media:content.media:title: Can I Finish a Huge Burger for $100?
media:content.media:description: A massive burger challenge with a cash prize on the line, testing appetite, endurance, and speed in a competitive eating setup.

item.title: Burrito Speed Challenge at La Ruleta
item.description: A fast-paced burrito speed challenge at La Ruleta, testing quick eating, big portions, and competitive food challenge energy.

media:content.media:title: Burrito Speed Challenge at La Ruleta
media:content.media:description: A fast-paced burrito speed challenge at La Ruleta, testing quick eating, big portions, and competitive food challenge energy.

item.title: Huge Sandwich Speed Challenge
item.description: Racing against the clock to finish a massive sandwich in a fast-paced food challenge focused on speed, portions, and competitive eating energy.

media:content.media:title: Huge Sandwich Speed Challenge
media:content.media:description: Racing against the clock to finish a massive sandwich in a fast-paced food challenge focused on speed, portions, and competitive eating energy.

item.title: Buffalo Wild Wings Challenge
item.description: A fast-paced wing-eating challenge featuring spicy and saucy wings, big portions, and competitive food challenge energy at Buffalo Wild Wings.

media:content.media:title: Buffalo Wild Wings Challenge
media:content.media:description: A fast-paced wing-eating challenge featuring spicy and saucy wings, big portions, and competitive food challenge energy at Buffalo Wild Wings.

item.title: Pizza Challenge at Pizza Alvino’s
item.description: A large pizza challenge at Pizza Alvino’s featuring big slices, bold flavors, and competitive eating energy in a local food showdown.

media:content.media:title: Pizza Challenge at Pizza Alvino’s
media:content.media:description: A large pizza challenge at Pizza Alvino’s featuring big slices, bold flavors, and competitive eating energy in a local food showdown.
